message:
chore(baselines): update benchmark baselines to 2026-02-16 run

Add timestamped snapshot baseline_20260215_225143.json and update
baseline_latest.json to match. Notable changes from previous run:
- budget/create_infinite ~50% faster (3.86ns → 1.92ns)
- budget/create_with_deadline ~34% faster (4.14ns → 2.72ns)
- budget/combine regressed ~89% (4.75ns → 8.98ns), likely due to
  the min-based tail rate fix in 22d2e6e changing the combine path
- arena/iterate_1000 improved ~5% (489ns → 463ns)
- Most other benchmarks show minor noise-level variation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
